label: Expressive Story (EN, with emotion tags)
text: [chuckle] You won't believe what happened. I was halfway through the deploy [pause] when the build started writing logs in a language I didn't recognize. [whisper] At first I thought I was hallucinating. [excited] Then it hit me — the linker had picked up an old dependency from a branch I deleted six months ago. [sigh] Six months.
